summary: Crispy, top‑notch sound captures a psychedelic set with standout Dark Star and The Other One
review: The recording is praised for its crisp, top‑notch audio quality, though the source type isn’t specified. Reviewers highlight a high‑energy performance featuring strong renditions of Dark Star, St Stephen, Me & My Uncle and an urgent Garcia lead on The Other One.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed review praises both the performance and sound quality; other reviews are non‑informative, so rating reflects a generally positive impression with limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review mentions “top notch sound” and “crispy”, indicating clear and well‑balanced audio; no specific issues noted.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer describes the set as a rapid‑fire burst of Dead mojo with strong transitions and psychedelic jams.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia’s urgent lead on The Other One is highlighted as a high point.
